description_long: This is a single metal-framed bed with a visibly aged and rusted appearance, featuring a rectangular mattress platform supported by two end frames. The frame is constructed from tubular metal bars, with both the headboard and footboard composed of vertical slats. The surface of the bed, including the mattress area, is heavily stained and mottled, showing signs of rust, corrosion, and neglect. The overall structure is utilitarian and industrial, reminiscent of beds found in abandoned hospitals, shelters, or urban derelict environments. The bed lacks any visible bedding or comfort items, exposing a bare, weathered mattress surface.
description: A rusted, industrial-style metal bed with a bare, stained mattress and slatted headboard and footboard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bed, highlighting the rusted metal frame and stained mattress surface.
description_view_1: Front view emphasizing the slatted footboard and the depth of the mattress platform.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the rust patterns and mattress wear.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the slatted headboard and the rectangular shape of the bed frame.
